use_cases: Simple increment/decrement counter for any UI context
Basic number input control for forms
Interactive counter for product pages or dashboards
Stepper control for quantity selection in e-commerce
ai_summary: A minimal React counter component with increment and decrement buttons. Features a centered layout with a heading, numeric display, and two interactive buttons that modify state. Built with Tailwind CSS and React hooks for simple, reusable counter functionality across any web application.
